MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel The Deposition Of Pltf'S Retained Expert Anthony Gamboa, Jr., Ph.D, Mba, Or Alternatively To Exclude Dr. Gamboa At Trial
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Francis Brown, Esq. of the Law Offices of Michael F. Brown, Tel. 925.824.3101, for defendants and moving party;
Brian J. Malloy, Esq. of The Brandi Law Firm, Tel. 415.989.1800, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. After arguments, DEFENDANT ANTONIOS PANAGIOTOPOULOS' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff's Retained Expert Anthony Gamboa, Jr., Ph.D, MBA, Or Alternatively, To Exclude Dr. Gamboa At Trial was taken under submission. The parties were instructed to submit a proposed order by email. Judge Pro Tem: Elan Lambert; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

(After hearing, the Court signed an order granting in part and denying in part defendant's motion to compel.)
